title: AuditVerdictBody v0.2
description: Cycle 1 substrate-core schema migration 002 — extends v0.1 AuditVerdictBody with three optional fields per HYBRID lock 4-NATO ratify-clean (cohort cycle 2026-05-26): signed_at (ISO-8601 signing timestamp), prev_audit_body_ref (in-payload chain pointer per DC-2 resolving OBS-A), signer_role (sender's role; signature-covered via PAE per Obs-3). All three are OPTIONAL on the type (back-compat preserved with legacy v0.1 bodies pre-dating Cycle 1; kind_version stays at literal 1). Identity attestation is handled by DSSE signatures[i].keyid per HYBRID (no in-payload signer_nato). See src/channels/audit-verdict.ts AuditVerdictBody type + parseAuditVerdictBody function for parser implementation. See plans/cycle-1-substrate-core-slice-plan-2026-05-26.md §2.6 for migration narrative + §4.2 for cross-pair contract.

kind_version.description: Schema version literal (stays at 1; optional v0.2 fields are additive).

cross_edge_consumers_verified.description: Optional readonly string[]; PR #120 b21f107 introduced; required non-empty for substrate-class PRs per isSubstrateClassPR(target_pr) send-time validation.

signed_at.description: v0.2: ISO-8601 timestamp when the audit-verdict was signed. Required when DSSE-wrapped (post-Migration-003 v0.3); optional/absent on legacy unsigned bodies. Verifier resolves the correct historical pubkey by matching this timestamp against signing NATO's keys/cohort/<nato>.history.json entries (DC-5).

prev_audit_body_ref.description: v0.2: SHA-256 of prior audit-verdict's canonical-JSON payload (in-payload signature-chain pointer per DC-2; resolves OBS-A — HMAC framing was incorrect crypto-primitive naming per Delta Phase 0 fact-base catch). null for bootstrap (first) audit-verdict in a channel per Charlie Obs-5 HYBRID write-side canonical. Absent on legacy v0.1 bodies.

signer_role.description: v0.2: sender's channel role at signing time (queue / driver / out etc; matches JSONL line role field). Signature-covered via PAE per Obs-3 4-NATO cohort HYBRID lock; line-vs-payload cross-check at verify time catches role-tamper attacks. NATO identity attestation is handled by DSSE signatures[i].keyid per HYBRID (no in-payload signer_nato).

x-claude-conductor.supersedes_migration_note: v0.1 bodies remain valid + parseable per back-compat discipline; v0.2 additive fields are optional.
x-claude-conductor.next_migration: 003 (v0.3 DSSE wrapper; Pair B substrate-core; PR-A5 in slice plan §8 10-step order)
